welcome:
👋 Murakaza neza kuri *MOYOTECH Solutions*!

 Aha munsi hari urutonde rwa serivisi zacu. Hitamo iyo wifuza:
service_not_available: Bihangane, iyo serivisi ntabwo ikiboneka. Reka nkwereke serivisi dufite ubu.
generic_error: Bihangane, hari ikibazo cyabaye mu gutunganya ubutumwa bwawe. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
no_services: Bihangane, nta serivisi zihari ubu. Mwaduhamagara mu buryo butaziguye.
select_service_footer: Turi hano kugira ngo tugufashe gutera imbere
rate_limit_error: 🔄 Dufite ubusabe bwinshi ubu. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya gato cyangwa wandike 'menu' kugira ngo urebe serivisi dushobora kugufasha.
connection_error: Mfite ikibazo cyo guhuza ubu. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya gato!
audio_transcription_failed: Bihangane, ntabashije gusobanukirwa ubutumwa bwawe bwa amajwi. Gerageza kohereza ubutumwa bwanditse aho.
auth_success_info: Ushobora gukoresha serivisi zo guhuza ubu.
auth_failure_info: Hari ikibazo cyabaye mu gihe cy'iyandikisha.
